summary: Comprehensive testing of Recommendation Engine and Advanced Learning Modules features. All backend APIs (21/21 tests passed) and frontend UI features verified working correctly.

issues: Minor: Console warning about duplicate React keys in recommendations section (non-critical)

seed_data_creation: User testlearn@test.com has 2 mood entries (stressed, anxious) and 3 completed learning lessons (f-1, f-2, f-3)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Recommendation Engine and Learning Modules fully tested. Recommendations show mood-based (breathing, meditation for anxious mood), time-based (afternoon picks), and engagement-based suggestions. Learning modules show 4 levels with proper unlock logic - Level 2-4 locked until previous level complete. Progress tracking works correctly.

recommendation_engine.response_structure: Contains recommendations[], time_period, mood_count, journal_count, journey_progress, engagement_score
recommendation_engine.mood_based_recs: Recommendations change based on user's latest mood (anxious -> breathing, meditation)
recommendation_engine.engagement_score: Calculated correctly (0-100 range) based on user activity

learning_modules.module_structure: Each module has id, title, subtitle, level, color, icon, duration, prerequisite, description, lessons, completed_count, total_lessons, unlocked, completed
learning_modules.lesson_structure: Each lesson has id, title, type, content, duration, tool_link
learning_modules.unlock_logic: Level 1 always unlocked, Level 2+ locked until previous level complete

complete_lesson_api.idempotent: Completing same lesson twice doesn't duplicate
complete_lesson_api.validation: Returns 400 for missing or invalid lesson_id

dashboard_ui.recommendations_section: 'For You' section displays with engagement score badge
dashboard_ui.recommendation_cards: 6 recommendation cards rendered with icons, names, reasons, descriptions
dashboard_ui.card_navigation: Clicking recommendation card navigates to correct tool page
dashboard_ui.stats_display: Streak, Mood Logs, Journal Entries stats displayed correctly
dashboard_ui.learn_action: Learn action button present in Explore & Practice grid

learn_page_ui.overall_progress: Progress bar shows X/16 lessons and X/4 modules done
learn_page_ui.module_cards: 4 module cards displayed (Foundations, Energy Mastery, Sound & Light, Integration)
learn_page_ui.module_unlock_visual: Locked modules show lock icon and dimmed appearance
learn_page_ui.module_click: Unlocked modules clickable, locked modules not clickable
learn_page_ui.learning_path: 'Your Learning Path' visualization shows all 4 levels with lock/unlock status

module_detail_view.back_button: 'All Modules' back button returns to module list
module_detail_view.lesson_cards: 4 lesson cards per module with title, type, duration
module_detail_view.lesson_status: Completed lessons show checkmark, locked lessons show lock icon

lesson_view.back_button: 'Back to [Module]' button returns to module detail
lesson_view.narration_player: Listen button with Nova voice selector
lesson_view.content: Lesson content displayed in readable format
lesson_view.tool_link: 'Practice this tool now' button navigates to related tool
lesson_view.complete_button: 'Mark as Complete' button or 'Lesson Completed' status

backend_apis_tested: GET /api/learning/modules - 200 with auth, 401 without auth, returns 4 modules
POST /api/learning/complete-lesson - 200 with valid data, 400 without lesson_id, 400 with invalid lesson_id, 401 without auth
Mood-based recommendations change when user logs new mood
Module unlock logic - Level 2 locked until all Level 1 lessons complete
